posts.author: RulzB (Raul Bustamnte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! I’ve been searching for a way to set the item description (within the widget) as a template but it seems that Monday Dev doesn’t have a native way to it.

Also, I couldn’t find a plugin to do this. Most of the template plugins only work with columns and their content.

Is there a way to transform the content in the widget to a template so my team use the same structure in the description?

Thanks a lot!
